title: Some Analysis thoughts on Rei and Shinji in the final Rebuild
display_title: Some Analysis thoughts on Rei and Shinji in the final Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: Some Analysis thoughts on Rei & Shinji in the final Rebuild             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Mar 13, 2026 7:14 pm It baffles me how some ppl still insist that reishin is non canon / all in our heads after the last Rebuild has an *unambiguous on-screen love confession* I mean, it was right in the proposal & ep 23 (or the EoE booklet for that matter... or like several pieces of tie-in music) were pretty clear as well, but it couldn't have been any clearer without heavy-handed cliches that wouldn't have fit the story or its spirit. Some ppl's selective hearing is impenetrable, but I don't think we need to take them seriously no more. It's certainly been amusing seeing all those ffs that instantly had both girls say "actually I meant the opposite / didn't mean it" I mean we even have Miyamura on Record as stating that: "in the end, Rei is the person who moves Shinji in Shin Eva and no matter what Asuka says, it doesn’t get through to him"

[]: Re: Some Analysis thoughts on Rei & Shinji in the final Rebuild             Quote Post by Konja7 » Fri Mar 13, 2026 8:14 pm Honestly, I don't think Rei Q is the same as Rei II. I feel there is a connection because Rei Q soul is Rei II, but they're still two different people. That's why Rei II still needs to be reminded by Shinji that Rei Q could have a place without the Eva in Village 3 (even although Rei II likely has Rei Q memories) in the Instrumentality. In fact, the way Shinji mentions Rei Q to Rei 2 in the Instrumentality doesn't treat them as the same person (even if both are Ayanami). Also, I should mention Rei Q confession is extremely ambiguous in Japanese (it's not even clear if her "like" is romantic or even directed at a single person). The English dub decided to make it a clearly romantic confession and I guess Khara aproved it, but I'm not sure we should ignore the intentional original ambiguity. Not that I would doubt Rei Q has romantic feeling for Shinji, but I think the original Japanese is ambiguous because it wants to leave it open to interpretation. PS: I also have doubts about Rei or Kaworu returning to Earth since they don't show this (while they're pretty clear with Asuka returning to Earth), but I guess it's intentionally ambiguous. Honestly, I would like both characters to live in Village 3.
